diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,145 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createFactory, createMiddleware, Factory, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: imports Hono from '../../hono', types from '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/types/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createFactory and createMiddleware for composing handlers and middleware with typed CreateHandlersInterface supporting 1-10 handlers with Env propagation.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: imports Context from '../../context', RouterRoute from '../../types', url utilities from '../../utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/mod.ts, src/types/types.ts, src/utils/url.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper extracts routing metadata from Context, provides matchedRoutes array and path helpers (routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath) for inspecting request routing context.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: imports Context from '../../context', types from '../../types', http-status from '../../utils/http-status'
+- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/http-status.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper defines upgradeWebSocket middleware with event listeners (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError) and WSContext for send/close control.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: imports parse/serialize from '../../utils/cookie', Context from '../../context'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie.ts, src/context.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie with __Secure- and __Host- prefix support for secure cookie handling.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: imports hc from '../../client', types from '../../client/types', Hono from '../../hono', Context from '../../context'
+- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/hono.ts, src/client/types.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper wraps app with createClient using custom fetch adapter for unit testing Hono applications mock requests.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: types Context from '../../context'
+- Neighbor files: src/context.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment (node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light) and provides env accessor for platform-specific bindings.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: imports html raw, jsx/dom/css from '../../jsx/dom', common helpers from './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/jsx/dom/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for server-side rendering with class name slugging, supports css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition with WeakMap-based context tracking for optimized styles.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, rawCssString, type constants
+- Reads as: no external file imports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/jsx/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common CSS helper utilities with symbol-based class/type system, provides buildStyleString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon with hash generation and minification.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, Hop-by-hop header filtering
+- Reads as: imports HTTPException from '../../http-exception', headers from '../../utils/headers'
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch requests with Connection header processing and hop-by-hop header cleanup per RFC 9110, removes content-encoding/length for streaming support.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: imports Hono from '../../hono', types from '../../types', color utilities from '../../utils/color', handler utilities from '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/hono.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/color.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper prints formatted route list (method + path + handler name) or inspects routes with optional verbose mode and color output.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: imports from '../../utils/html'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper escapes strings by default and renders template strings with callback support for async HTML fragments.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, ssgParams, ssg, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: exports from './ssg', './middleware', './plugins'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper generates static HTML to filesystem, includes plugins for hooks, supports dynamic route rendering with ssgParams middleware and isSSGContext detection.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, generateFilePath, defaultPlugin types
+- Reads as: imports utilities from '../../utils/concurrent', '../../utils/mime', './middleware', './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/utils/concurrent.ts, src/utils/mime.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic fetches all non-dynamic route responses, determines file extensions from Content-Type, saves files concurrently using FileSystemModule interface.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: imports Hono from '../../hono', utils/handler from '../../utils/handler', router constants from '../../router'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG utilities filter static routes, check dynamic rou
